title: Soul Flag
content:
Soul Flags
 are items used to trap and refine souls in the world of Renegade Immortal.

Uses
[
]

Captured Souls can be refined and utilised at the wielder's whim. The souls of relatives can be used to track down individuals. Further to this, if a person is attacked using their parent's souls abd their 
Cultivation
 is below the 
Foundation Establishment
 Stage, they will die instantly by experiencing their souls breaking.
